name: Smoked Sausage and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can Spicy red chilli beans 15 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart Dutch oven, sauté onion and garlic, stirring constantly (no oil needed).
2. Add sliced smoked sausage and lightly brown it.
3. Pour in the chicken or beef broth and all other ingredients except cabbage.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for half an hour.
5. Add finely shredded cabbage and cook for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Serve with warm bread.
